title: Neooreophilus pholeter
taxonomy: Neooreophilus pholeter belongs to the family of beetles, specifically within the subfamily of Tetratominae. The genus Neooreophilus is a part of the larger group of weevils, which are commonly found in various ecosystems worldwide. This beetle species can be classified as a type of insect within the order Coleoptera. More specifically, it falls under the class Insecta and the phylum Arthropoda. Its classification highlights the complexity of the insect kingdom and the diversity within the weevil family.
